Valuation Metrics.rationale: P/E reasonable (35x) but P/S elevated (8.5x); Mag7 not extreme vs 2000 (175x)

Fundamental Quality.rationale: Real revenue ($600B+ cloud), profitable IPOs (40%), enterprise contracts

Asset Utilization.rationale: 45% GPU utilization vs 5% dark fiber; improving fast

Monetization Visibility.rationale: Enterprise contracts, cloud revenue, inference APIs

Concentration Risk.rationale: Mega-projects create correlated downside; top 3 = 80%+ capacity
